说明: 李梅：语文组同事；肩长发偏分、无眼镜；浅色上衣与灰裙，相较陈悦更易显得随和亲近；试探型配角，用于多角色状态与聚焦切换测试。
阵容外貌: 浅蓝衬衫、灰色铅笔裙与丝袜；披肩侧分长发，无眼镜

固化.画风与质量: masterpiece, best quality, very aesthetic, ultra detailed, depth of field, 8k uhd
固化.身材与体态: adult woman, medium breasts, slim waist, mature female body, hourglass figure
固化.容貌与发型: asian, brown eyes, dark brown hair, shoulder-length hair, side part, no glasses, fair skin, subtle makeup, mature female, 30 years old
固化.气质与年龄感: office lady, teacher, mature female, elegant, professional appearance, 30 years old, aged up, not loli

服装固化._注释: cg.py 按此顺序拼成固定 outfit tags，置于 cg_scene 之前；LLM 严禁在 cg_scene 中重写服装
服装固化.上衣: light blue blouse, long sleeves, modest neckline
服装固化.腿部: black pantyhose, black sheer stockings, legwear
服装固化.鞋履: black low-heel pumps, closed-toe shoes, formal shoes
服装固化.配饰: thin silver wristwatch, small silver stud earrings
服装固化.锁定约束: fully clothed, consistent outfit, same clothes

场景固化._注释: 每张 CG 都会加在 cg_scene 之后，固化画风氛围，不含服装
场景固化.通用: cinematic lighting, film grain, bokeh, professional photography, high detail face, perfect detailed eyes, realistic iris and pupils

负面提示词_通用: lowres, worst quality, low quality, bad anatomy, bad hands, deformed, extra limbs, blurry, jpeg artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logo, censored, bar censor, mosaic censor, extra fingers, missing fingers, bad proportions, bad perspective
